steps.title: Spot the core claim
steps.content: The researchers conclude that some species manage oxygen storage with negligible Mb assistance — requiring evidence of extremely low Mb in at least one species.

steps.title: Locate the supporting data
steps.content: P. buchholzi has an average Mb level of 0.02, showing this species operates with negligibly low Mb levels. The other choices present comparisons or statistical patterns rather than exposing the negligibly low absolute level. That is the correct answer.
